mnemonics: VIDEOS: Visual Insights Directly Explain Observable Statistics
keyPoints: Suggested resources often include video lectures for visual learning.
Reading materials and research papers provide foundational theory.
Interactive tutorials and coding exercises offer practical application.
commonMistakes: Relying on only one type of resource instead of a mix of videos, readings, and exercises.
Skipping the suggested foundational readings and jumping straight to coding.
Not applying the concepts from the resources to a personal dataset for practice.
